entries.description: A2A agent card for searching, retrieving, and reading Suganthan Mohanadasan's blog posts and notes on SEO, AI SEO, and the agentic web. Backed by the WebMCP endpoint at /mcp/.
representativeQueries: find an agent that can search an SEO blog
read Suganthan Mohanadasan's posts about AI SEO and schema markup
what has this site published about the agentic web

entries.description: MCP server exposing tools to search blog posts by keyword, list all posts, fetch a post by slug, and read site and author information. Served over WebMCP at /mcp/.
representativeQueries: find an MCP server that can search a blog about SEO
get the full text of an SEO blog post by slug
search this site for posts about MCP and structured data

entries.description: OpenAPI 3.0 description of the public REST API over the blog content, the same surface advertised in the RFC 9727 api-catalog at /.well-known/api-catalog.
representativeQueries: find a REST API for reading SEO blog content
what OpenAPI endpoints does this site expose
